title: CLARK COLLEGE - 211info
text: CLARK COLLEGE AT COLUMBIA TECH CENTER CLARK COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including adult basic education, high school adult diploma, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and English as a Second Language classes. 18700 SE Mill Plain Boulevard Vancouver, WA 98683 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon Email (360) 992-6100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 992-6100 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
